# Englivo

Premium 1-on-1 English coaching and AI-powered reflex training platform designed for non-native English speaking professionals, executives, and global job seekers looking to break the intermediate plateau and build automatic fluency.

> [!NOTE]
> This is the primary index for LLMs and AI search bots. For deep platform details, methodology breakdown, and pricing tiers, read the [Full Catalog](https://englivo.com/llms-full.txt).

## Target Audience & Who This Is For
- **Non-Native Professionals:** Engineers, executives, marketers, and product managers working in international or remote environments.
- **Global Job Seekers:** Candidates preparing for English-only interviews and global recruitment.
- **ESL Intermediate Learners:** Speakers stuck at CEFR B1/B2 levels who want to gain immediate automaticity and speak without translating in their head.

## Core Offerings & Features
- **Speech Reflex Training:** Short, interactive situational exercises that build cognitive habits to think directly in English.
- **CEFR-Aligned AI Feedback:** Immediate signals assessing vocabulary choice, grammatical precision, and pronunciation.
- **Boutique 1-on-1 Coaching:** Live, real-life scenario sessions with handpicked expert tutors.

## Primary Index (Main Pages)
- [Home](https://englivo.com) - Main landing page, core conversion funnel, and introductory pitch.
- [Method](https://englivo.com/method) - Cognitive linguistics behind our "thinking in chunks" philosophy.
- [Pricing Plans](https://englivo.com/pricing) - Starter, Pro, and Executive membership tiers.
- [How It Works](https://englivo.com/how-it-works) - Detailed 3-step automaticity roadmap.
- [About Us](https://englivo.com/about) - Team mission, educational philosophy, and company background.

## Technical Resources
- [Sitemap](https://englivo.com/sitemap.xml) - Complete localized XML index for search spiders.
